verdict.outlook: indexes range-bound, volatility normal, offensive sectors leading → constructive. Expect follow-through; favor longs and breakouts.

missing.detail: rejection / reclaim candle in your direction

market.label: tape-neutral
market.note: Tape neutral — indexes range-bound. Leaders: XLK, XLF, XLV.

ladder.scale_out: Take 50% @ T1 → stop to breakeven → run 50% to T2

decision.reason: Long S/R Breakout with a strong bullish tape (100.0); higher-TF neutral. Trigger and evidence agree.

candlestick_patterns.description: Bullish Harami — small bullish bar inside prior bearish body
Inside Bar — compression; breakout direction = next move
Bearish Harami — small bearish bar inside prior bullish body
Inside Bar — compression; breakout direction = next move
Bullish Engulfing — buyers completely overwhelmed sellers
Doji — indecision, potential reversal

Doji — indecision, potential reversal
Evening Star — 3-bar bearish reversal after uptrend
